title: P/E Ratio: Calculate the adjusted P/E ratio if the target firm has...
summary: Calculate an adjusted P/E ratio for a combined entity using weighted EPS and P/E ratios.
prompt: Calculate the adjusted P/E ratio if the target firm has an EPS of $2, a P/E ratio of 12, and the acquirer has an EPS of $3 and a P/E ratio of 15.
solution: Adjusted P/E = (Target EPS * Target P/E + Acquirer EPS * Acquirer P/E) / (Target EPS + Acquirer EPS) = (2*12 + 3*15) / (2 + 3) = 13.5.
